author: y4rr
content: Fixed in commit 92a19db3 as part of Sprint B.4 (#914). Root cause: fixture has 'shape'/'world_size' keys but test read f.mesh_shape/f.mesh_world_size (non-existent fields). Fix: device_mesh_new_valid_matches_fixture now reads f.shape and f.world_size. cascade_skip removed. Test passes.
